chat.title: Nug txog Milwaukee
chat.initial:
Nyob zoo! Kuv pab tau koj to taub cov ntaub ntawv zej zog. Sim nug:

• Muaj pes tsawg lub tsev khoob?
• Kev ua txhaum cai zoo li cas?
• Sib piv zej zog
